title: Rekt on Hyperliquid
summary_title: Cosmos collapse, HyperLiquid drama, and why execution beats announcements
summary_description: Cosmos extracted its users. HyperBeat-Kinetic tension. Why the best teams stay silent and ship.

key_moments.label: Cosmos ecosystem: years of profits that should have been taken
Trading pre-IPO stocks like SpaceX on Hyperliquid; positions still open
HyperBeat-Kinetic drama: promises vs. execution on point rewards
Drop protocol farmed users for a year, then shut down without sharing gains
HyperEVM: same boring shit as every other chain, same boring results
Cosmos Hub creator Jaquan forking to build Atone; destroying what he created
Banker trading engine becoming available via API to other platforms

pull_quote: If they're not going to build something good enough on Hyper EVM, we're just going to build it better on Hyper Core. And that'll be that.
